basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.label: Ph.D. Candidate in Computer Science
basics.summary: First-year Ph.D. candidate at HKUST NLP Group, advised by Prof. Junxian He. Research focuses on natural language processing and machine learning, including LLM reasoning, hallucination in VLMs, and LLM truthfulness and interpretability.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)

work.summary: Research intern working on large language models.
Research intern advised by Zifei Shan.
Research intern advised by Prof. Yu Cheng.

awards.title: Zhiyuan Honor Scholarship
awards.summary: Awarded at Shanghai Jiao Tong University.

publications.name: SynLogic: Synthesizing Verifiable Reasoning Data at Scale for Learning Logical Reasoning and Beyond
publications.summary: First-author work on synthesizing verifiable reasoning data at scale for training LLM logical reasoning.

publications.name: On the Perception Bottleneck of VLMs for Chart Understanding
publications.summary: First-author work on perception bottlenecks in vision-language models for chart understanding.

publications.name: On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
publications.summary: First-author work identifying a universal truthfulness direction inside LLMs.

publications.name: In-Context Sharpness as Alerts: An Inner Representation Perspective for Hallucination Mitigation
publications.summary: Co-authored work on using inner representations to mitigate LLM hallucination.

publications.name: C-Eval: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models
publications.summary: Co-authored Chinese evaluation benchmark for foundation models.

publications.name: Composing Parameter-Efficient Modules with Arithmetic Operations
publications.summary: Co-authored work on composing parameter-efficient modules with arithmetic operations.
